title: onagra macrosceles
intro: Onagra macrosceles, also known as Bladder Campion, is a perennial plant species in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Bladder Campion include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Bladder Campion can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
